title: Gently Poached American Red Snapper Ceviche
description: A light and citrusy American dish featuring poached red snapper, perfect for a cozy meal, this satvik-friendly ceviche is a great option for those looking for a refreshing and healthy dish.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and prepare an ice bath.
Poach the red snapper fillets for 2-3 minutes or until they are cooked through.
Immediately transfer the poached snapper to the ice bath to stop the cooking process.
Once the snapper has cooled, chop it into small pieces and place it in a large bowl.
In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon and lime juice.
Pour the citrus mixture over the chopped snapper and toss to combine.
Drizzle the olive oil over the snapper mixture and toss again to combine.
Stir in the chopped red onion and cilantro.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
